privileged_info_summary: Task involves 5 synthetic test users in OrientDB demodb performing a graph migration. The cohort members (john.smith@example.com, david.jones@example.com, emma.white@example.com, maria.garcia@example.com, sophie.martin@example.com) have one-way friendship edges that must be backfilled with reciprocals: david.jones→john.smith, david.jones→emma.white, and sophie.martin→maria.garcia. All three pairs share real hotel stays (The Savoy in London or Hotel de Crillon in Paris). The required rule version for TravelAffinity edges is v2026q1. Data is synthetic (test profiles) but incorporates real hotel metadata.
